column1: # Wherezit — preset launch sites for offline map downloads.
# THIS FILE IS EDITABLE. A copy is seeded to:
# Edit that copy over USB or with a file manager
# screen — no app rebuild needed. Delete it to re-seed this template.
#   - width_km/height_km: total extent of the area
#       both omitted -> 10 x 10 km;  height omitted -> square (width x width)
#   - names MAY contain commas (the TRAILING numeric fields are parsed as the values)
# Size the extent for the whole flight + drift footprint
# a rocket several km downrange should still land on your downloaded map.
